services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, trim — we prep everything properly so your paint job lasts years, not months.

services.title: Cabinet Refinishing
services.description: Transform those 30-year-old oak cabinets into something you actually want to look at every morning.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Weather-resistant coatings that stand up to Georgia heat and humidity. Your curb appeal, protected.

services.title: Texture Removal
services.description: Popcorn ceilings scraped smooth, even around crown molding. The detail work that separates pros from amateurs.

about.heading: Josh Purvis and His Macon Crew
about.body: We're the team your neighbors recommend when they want their paint job done right the first time. Professional, punctual, and obsessed with the details that make a house feel like home. Based in Macon, serving Middle Georgia with the kind of craftsmanship that earns 283 five-star reviews.

reviews.name: Marissa E.
reviews.text: Fast, professional, absolutely perfect work. Josh and his team delivered exactly what they promised.

reviews.name: Landon W.
reviews.text: Came highly recommended and lived up to every word. Quote the day after we got our house keys.

reviews.name: Jana W.
reviews.text: Best experience from start to finish. Professional, punctual, detail-oriented — results exceeded expectations.

reviews.name: Linda C.
reviews.text: Popcorn ceiling removal and painting with crown molding. They met and exceeded my expectations completely.

cta.heading: Ready for Perfection?
cta.body: Join 283 happy homeowners who chose Josh Purvis Painting. Quick quotes, professional work, results that last.
